# mcp-cursor screenshot drop

The four screenshots referenced by
[docs/getting-started/mcp-with-cursor.md](../../getting-started/mcp-with-cursor.md)
live here once captured:

- `01-api-key.png` — Cordum dashboard Settings → API Keys panel.
- `02-welcome.png` — Cursor welcome screen on first launch.
- `03-mcp-settings.png` — Cursor Settings → Features → Model
  Context Protocol panel with the cordum server listed.
- `04-tool-call.png` — Cursor chat panel showing a cordum tool-call
  result.

Same capture contract as `docs/static/img/mcp-claude-code/` — a
human tester captures these during the onboarding cold-test run and
commits them alongside the filled-in cold-test report at
`docs/mcp/cold-tests/<date>-cursor-<tester>.md`.
